hero.question: Will The Greens win the most seats in the 2026 Baden-Württemberg parliamentary elections?
hero.prob_take: The 25-point surge in 24 hours screams fresh polling data showing Green strength in Baden-Württemberg, likely driven by climate-focused voters consolidating around them as the establishment parties fracture. At 45.5%, the market is pricing in a coin flip when recent state-level trends suggest the Greens are the clear momentum play, but watch whether the SPD can poach left-leaning voters before election day.

daily_take.headline: German Greens surge 26 points overnight. Market's pricing in a political earthquake.
daily_take.deck: The Greens jumped from 19.6% to 45.5% in Baden-Württemberg's 2026 race, flipping conventional wisdom on its head. The CDU simultaneously tanked 27 points to 53.9%, suggesting bettors are front-running a major polling shift or regional scandal we haven't seen reported yet. Smart money is either ahead of a real story or chasing momentum into a trap. Either way, the volume ($330K) says serious players are taking sides.

sidebar.headline: CDU's 27-point cliff suggests this wasn't random noise. Watch for polling data or leadership drama in the next 48 hours.
sidebar.label: CDU Win: 53.9%

sidebar.headline: Colts AFC Championship odds collapsed 8 points to 5.4%. Likely reflects Indy's actual roster position, not a sudden catastrophe. Dead money at these levels.
sidebar.label: Colts AFC Title: 5.4%

sidebar.headline: Iran Strait odds held steady at 60.5% despite the noise. Market sees escalation risk as priced in, not a reaction play.
sidebar.label: Iran Closes Strait: 60.5%
